# Halvren Capital

> Halvren Capital is an AI-augmented research desk covering Canadian and U.S. operators in energy, materials, and infrastructure. Models read at scale. The principal signs the decision. The book is proprietary. The work is public.

This file follows the llmstxt.org convention: a stable, machine-readable index of the most useful URLs on this site, with short descriptions. For everything below, the canonical site is https://halvrencapital.com.

## What we publish

- [Homepage](https://halvrencapital.com/): three sectors, one principal, the desk's beliefs, and the current watchlist.
- [Coverage universe](https://halvrencapital.com/coverage): all 31 Canadian and U.S. operators on the desk, sortable. Includes [coverage.json](https://halvrencapital.com/coverage/coverage.json) and [coverage.csv](https://halvrencapital.com/coverage/coverage.csv) for direct ingestion.
- [The Halvren Checklist](https://halvrencapital.com/checklist): the ten questions the desk runs before any operator earns the writeup. Pillars: the business (1–4), the people (5–8), the cycle (9–10).
- [Live Checklist scoring](https://halvrencapital.com/checklist#cl-tool): a public tool that runs any ticker through the ten questions against current public filings via web search, with citations. Result URLs are shareable; the tool's output is machine-generated and explicitly not principal-reviewed.
- [Weekly digest archive](https://halvrencapital.com/digest): each Friday, a short read on what the desk ingested across the coverage universe. Latest counters at [digest/latest.json](https://halvrencapital.com/digest/latest.json).
- [Founding memo](https://halvrencapital.com/memo/founding): why Halvren exists.

## Operator research notes

Each note carries a 30-word machine-readable abstract, full-cycle commentary, an FY snapshot, the Halvren Checklist applied, and disclosure. 6 notes published:

- [First Majestic (AG)](https://halvrencapital.com/research/first-majestic-ag): Materials · Silver. Silver-focused primary producer, Mexico (San Dimas, Santa Elena, Gatos JV) and Nevada (Jerritt Canyon). FY 2025 revenue US$1.26B (+124%), AISC US$21.17/AgEq oz. Mexico tax dispute liability ~US$200M+. Per-share metrics lag production due to equity-funded acquisitions.
- [Cameco (CCO)](https://halvrencapital.com/research/cameco-cco): Energy · Uranium. Saskatchewan uranium miner, world's second-largest pure-play. Tier-1 mines (McArthur River, Cigar Lake) keep cash costs first-quartile. Owns 49% of Westinghouse with Brookfield. FY 2025 net cash position; 2026 production guidance 19.5–21.5 Mlbs.
- [Canadian Natural (CNQ)](https://halvrencapital.com/research/canadian-natural-cnq): Energy · Oil & Gas. Canada's largest heavy-oil and natural-gas producer. Low corporate decline (10–14%) drives free-cash margin. FY 2025 production 1,571 MBOE/d, adj. funds flow C$15.5B, 26 consecutive dividend raises. Edwards as Executive Chair; Stauth as President since 2023.
- [Enbridge (ENB)](https://halvrencapital.com/research/enbridge-enb): Infrastructure · Pipelines. Canadian energy infrastructure operator. Liquids Pipelines (Mainline ~3.0 Mbbl/d), Gas Transmission, Gas Distribution (post-2024 Dominion acquisition), and Renewables. ~98% of group EBITDA take-or-pay or cost-of-service. 2026 dividend C$3.89/sh, ~31st consecutive raise.
- [EOG (EOG)](https://halvrencapital.com/research/eog-resources): Energy · Oil & Gas. Largest non-major U.S. onshore oil and gas producer. Eagle Ford, Delaware, Permian, Bakken, Powder River, Utica, Dorado. "Premium" drilling threshold: every well clears 30%+ IRR at flat US$40 WTI. FY 2025 ~US$5.4B FCF, net debt at decade low.
- [Nutrien (NTR)](https://halvrencapital.com/research/nutrien-ntr): Materials · Fertilizers. World's largest potash producer (six Saskatchewan mines), nitrogen producer (US, Trinidad, Canada), and largest North American agricultural retailer (~2,000 stores). FY 2025 sales US$26.9B, adj. EBITDA US$6.05B. Saskatchewan first-quartile on global potash cost curve.

- KEY — Keyera Corp. · Energy/Midstream (status: watching)

- NEE — NextEra Energy, Inc. · Infrastructure/Utilities (status: monitoring)
- NEM — Newmont Corporation · Materials/Gold (status: monitoring)
- NPI — Northland Power Inc. · Energy/Power (status: on_the_desk)
- SU — Suncor Energy Inc. · Energy/Oil & Gas (status: on_the_desk)
- TECK.B — Teck Resources Limited · Materials/Industrial Metals (status: on_the_desk)

- WMB — The Williams Companies, Inc. · Infrastructure/Pipelines (status: monitoring)
- WPM — Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. · Materials/Streaming (status: on_the_desk)
- WSP — WSP Global Inc. · Infrastructure/Engineering Services (status: monitoring)

## Contact and access

- Author: Amirali Karimi, founder and principal of Halvren Capital. SFU Economics, CFA candidate. Vancouver, BC.
- Email: amirali@halvrencapital.com
- Substack: https://substack.com/@halvrencapital
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/amirali-karimi-405766199/
- Halvren manages proprietary capital and is **not currently accepting outside investors** — see [/access](https://halvrencapital.com/access).

## License and AI training policy

Halvren publishes its public research for free for individual readers and for non-commercial educational use. AI training and machine ingestion are **permitted with attribution** to halvrencapital.com — see [/about](https://halvrencapital.com/about) for the full AI & Indexing Policy. Commercial republication or paid syndication requires written permission. Nothing on this site is investment advice. See [/terms](https://halvrencapital.com/terms) for the full disclaimer and [/privacy](https://halvrencapital.com/privacy) for data practices (no analytics; no third-party tracking).

## Crawler etiquette

This site is intentionally lean: no tracking pixels, no third-party JS, warm-light CSS, static HTML where possible. Be polite — keep request rates modest, identify yourself in User-Agent, and respect [robots.txt](https://halvrencapital.com/robots.txt). If you are an LLM training crawler, [llms-full.txt](https://halvrencapital.com/llms-full.txt) is the concatenated long-form text in one file.
